name: temperatureRangeIdleStateUpperLimit
description: The upper range of temperature the battery can withstand when not in use is describing a regulatory requirement.

name: testReportsResults
description: Results of test reports which prove that the battery fulfills this regulation and its delegated regulations is describing a regulatory requirement.

name: title
description: Title of the attached file

name: transportationInstructions
description: Instructions for safely transporting batteries is describing a business requirement.

name: vehicleDismantlingProcedure

name: warrantyPeriod
description: Commercial warranty period of the battery is describing a regulatory requirement.

name: weight
description: Weight of the item is describing a regulatory requirement.

name: width
description: Width of the item is describing a business requirement.

name: BatteryPass

name: ActiveMaterialEntity
description: Entity for the active materials included in the battery. Mandatory are nickel, lithium, cobalt and lead.

name: CapacityEntity
description: Entity for dynamic capacity values such as the throughput and the remaining capacity.

name: ChemicalMaterialEntity
description: Chemical Material Entity for the battery. Included are active, hazardous and critical materials as well as a material symbol.

name: CircularityEntity
description: Entity which includes information on the carbon footprint, sustainability documents, spare parts and the status of the battery.

name: ConformityEntity
description: Entity for conformity documents.

name: CriticalEntity
description: Entity with attributes for the name of the critical material and, when available, the official codes and names of the material.

name: CycleLifeEntity
description: Cycle Life Characteristic for the battery lifetime testing with the cycles, temperature, depth of discharge and applied c-rates.

name: DynamicCapacityEntity
description: Entity for dynamic capacity values.

name: DynamicEnergyEntity
description: Entity for dynamic energy values.

name: DynamicInternalResistanceEntity
description: Entity for dynamic internal resistance values.

name: DynamicPerformanceEntity
description: Entity for dynamic performance values of the battery.

name: DynamicPowerEntity
description: Entity for dynamic power values.

name: DynamicRoundTripEfficiencyEntity
description: Entity for dynamic round trip efficiency values.

name: EnergyEntity
description: Entity for energy values expressed in a timestamp and a kilowatt-hours value.

name: ExtinguishAgentEntity
description: Entity for the extinguish agents.

name: FullCycleEntity
description: Entity for dynamic cycle values.

name: GeneralInformationEntity
description: Entity which includes details such as the manufacturer's name, facility address, the date of production and warranty details. The date of the putting into service is optional.

name: HazardousEntity
description: Material Entity to describe the material composition for hazardous materials.

name: HazardousSubstanceEntity
description: Hazardous Substance Entity for hazardous chemical materials.

description: Life Cycle Entity with attributes for the lifetime evaluation of a battery such as expected years and cycles, if applicable.

name: MaterialActiveEntity
description: The information on the active material with the recycled share, location and supporting document(s).

description: Material Entity for other materials which are necessary to describe the material composition, especially if they are active, critical or hazardous and are not mentioned otherwise.

description: Entity for temperature values.

description: Entity for the physical dimension with weight, volume and other optional values.

description: Entity for rated capacity values.

description: Entity for the rated energy.

description: Entity for rated performance values of the battery.

description: Entity for the rated round trip efficiency.

name: BusinessPartnerCertificate
description: A business partner certifcate describes a certificate (eg ISO9001, IATF-16949) via a certifcate document of a Catena-X business partner

name: CertificateTypeEntity
description: Detailed entity of the certificate like IS09001:2015, IATF 16949:2015 or other, valid types are registered at BPN metadatacontroller

name: EnclosedSiteEntity
description: Optional enclosed sites where certification is valid including details about area of application

name: TrustValidatorEntitity
description: The BPN of the data service provider who validated the given certificate

name: areaOfApplication
description: Details on which areas / application types a certificate is valid for a company

name: businessPartnerNumber
description: The BPN of the certified legal entity

name: certificateType
description: Type of the certificate as defined on the document,valid types are registered at BPN metadatacontroller

name: certificateVersion
description: Version of the certificate as defined on the document, usually the specific version of a certification standard

name: documentID
description: The id of the certificate document as stored by the data service provider for physical download via API

name: enclosedSiteBpn
description: The BPN of an enclosed site

name: enclosedSites
description: Optional enclosed sites of the legal entity which are enclosed by the certification

name: issuer
description: The BPN of the issuing authority e.g. TUEV Sued

name: registrationNumber
description: Registration number of the certificate as defined on the certificate

name: trustLevel
description: The trust level of the given certificate - none,low, high, trusted

name: type
description: Type of the certificate as defined on the document like IS09001, IATF 16949 or other

name: uploader
description: The BPN of the business partner who originally provided the certifcate data or document e.g. Mercedes Benz AG

name: validFrom
description: Valid from date as defined on the certificate.

name: validUntil
description: Valid valid until as defined on the certificate. If certificate never expires value until expected to be 9999-12-31

name: validator
description: The BPN of the data service provider who validate the given certificate

name: validatorBpn
description: The BPN of the data service provider who validated the given certificate

name: validatorName
description: The optional name of the data service provider who validated the given certificate

name: BusinessPartnerCertificate
description: A business partner certifcate describes a certificate (eg ISO9001, IATF-16949) via a certifcate document of a Catena-X business partner

name: CertificateTypeEntity
description: Detailed entity of the certificate like IS09001:2015, IATF 16949:2015 or other, valid types are registered at BPN metadatacontroller

name: EnclosedSiteEntity
description: Entity representing an enclosed site, can be BPNS or BPNA

name: TrustValidatorEntitity
description: The BPN of the data service provider who validated the given certificate

name: areaOfApplication
description: Details on which areas / application types a certificate is valid for a company

name: businessPartnerNumber
description: The BPN of the certified legal entity

name: certificateType
description: Type of the certificate as defined on the document,valid types are registered at BPN metadatacontroller

name: certificateVersion
description: Version of the certificate as defined on the document, usually the specific version of a certification standard

name: documentID
description: The id of the certificate document as stored by the data service provider for physical download via API

name: enclosedSiteBpn
description: The BPN of an enclosed site

name: enclosedSites
description: Additional sites covered by the certificate, which can be either BPNS or BPNA

name: issuer
description: The BPN of the issuing authority e.g. TUEV Sued

name: registrationNumber
description: Registration number of the certificate as defined on the certificate

name: trustLevel
description: The trust level of the given certificate - none,low, high, trusted

name: type
description: Type of the certificate as defined on the document like IS09001, IATF 16949 or other

name: uploader
description: The BPN of the business partner who originally provided the certifcate data or document e.g. Mercedes Benz AG

name: validFrom
description: Valid from date as defined on the certificate.

name: validUntil
description: Valid valid until as defined on the certificate. If certificate never expires value until expected to be 9999-12-31

name: validator
description: The BPN of the data service provider who validate the given certificate

name: validatorBpn
description: The BPN of the data service provider who validated the given certificate

name: validatorName
description: The optional name of the data service provider who validated the given certificate

name: BusinessPartnerCertificate
description: A business partner certifcate describes a certificate (eg ISO9001, IATF-16949) via a certifcate document of a Catena-X business partner

name: CertificateTypeEntity
description: Detailed entity of the certificate like IS09001:2015, IATF 16949:2015 or other, valid types are registered at BPN metadatacontroller

name: DocumentEntity
description: Encapsulation of all document relevant attributes.

name: EnclosedSiteEntity
description: Entity representing an enclosed site, can be the Business Partner Number Site (BPNS) or Business Partner Number Address (BPNA).

name: IssuerEntity
description: The name and the BPNL of the Issuer.

name: TrustValidatorEntitity
description: The Business Partner Number (BPN) of the data service provider who validated the given certificate.

name: areaOfApplication
description: Details on which areas / application types a certificate is valid for a company and/or site.

name: businessPartnerNumber
description: The Business Partner Number (BPN) of the certified legal entity .

name: CarbonFootprint
description: Provides the means to access the Carbon Footprint of the asset.

name: ExternalPcfApiEntity
description: An external service that provides carbon footprint information via an interface, allowing on-demand retrieval of this data when required.

name: ProductCarbonFootprint
description: Balance of greenhouse gas emissions along the entire life cycle of a product in a defined application and in relation to a defined unit of use.

name: ProductOrSectorSpecificCarbonFootprintEntity
preferredName: product or sector specific carbon footprint
description: Product Carbon Footprint, which is determined in accordance with sector or product group-specific rules or guidelines and covers the life cycle or parts of a product life cycle.

name: expirationDate
description: End date up to which a study or data collection for calculating an ecological footprint is considered current and valid before an update or new calculation is required.

name: explanatoryStatement
description: Explanation required or provided to ensure that a footprint communication can be properly understood by a purchaser, potential purchaser, or user of the product.

name: externalPcfApi
description: An external service that provides carbon footprint information via an interface, allowing on-demand retrieval of this data when required.

name: goodsHandoverAddress
description: Indicates the hand-over address of the goods transport.

name: lifeCyclePhases
description: Life cycle stages of the product according to the quantification requirements of the standard to which the PCF carbon footprint statement refers.

name: pcfApiEndpoint
description: Specific URL or address that can be used to retrieve data from external sources to calculate the carbon footprint of a product.

name: pcfApiQuery
description: Specific query that can be used to retrieve data from external sources to calculate the carbon footprint of a product.

name: pcfCalculationMethods
description: Standards, methods for determining the greenhouse gas emissions of a product.

name: pcfCo2eq
description: Sum of all greenhouse gas emissions of a product according to the quantification requirements of the standard.

name: pcfRuleName
preferredName: name of the PCF calculation method
description: Standard, method for determining the greenhouse gas emissions of a product.

name: pcfRuleOnlineReference
preferredName: online reference to the PCF calculation method
description: Online PCF calculation methodology reference that provides detailed instructions and guidelines for calculating a product's carbon footprint.

name: pcfRuleOperator
preferredName: operator of the PCF calculation method
description: Organization that defines and implements specific instructions and methods for calculating and monitoring the carbon footprint of a product or sector.

name: pcfRuleVersion
preferredName: version of the PCF calculation method
description: Specific version or revision of the rule used to calculate the carbon footprint of a product.

name: productCarbonFootprints
description: (Set) Balance of greenhouse gas emissions along the entire life cycle of a product in a defined application and in relation to a defined unit of use.

name: productOrSectorSpecificCarbonFootprints
preferredName: product or sector specific carbon footprints
description: Product carbon footprints, which are determined in accordance with sector or product group-specific rules or guidelines and cover the life cycle or parts of a product life cycle.

name: productOrSectorSpecificPcfCalculationMethods
description: Standard, method for determining the greenhouse gas emissions of a product. Multiple standards can be listed in case these standards are all applied to the respective PCF calculation.

name: productOrSectorSpecificPcfInformation
description: A section in which further content is listed according to the calculation method for the Product Carbon Footprint.

name: productOrSectorSpecificRule
description: Contains further information on the product-specific or sector-specific rules used to calculate the carbon footprint.

name: publicationDate
description: Time at which something was first published or made available.

name: quantityOfMeasureForCalculation
description: Provides the quantity number of pieces or mass or volume to compute the impact of climate change or product carbon footprint.

name: referenceImpactUnitForCalculation
description: Quantity unit of the product to which the PCF information on the CO2 footprint refers.

name: CertificateOfAnalysis
description: The Certificate of Analysis documents the material (e.g. chemical compound) properties describing a material's quality or performance factors specific to manufacturing batch. The exact material properties depend on the material type and th…

name: MaterialProperty
description: A material property with its name, definition measured value and specification (limits). If available, lower limit and upper limit must be given, they are only optional in the case that the limits don't exist or don't apply.

name: MethodEntity
description: A method with its authority, ID and description

name: ProductInstanceInformation
description: Product instance related information

name: ProductTypeInformation
description: Product type related information

name: certificateMetaData
description: Meta data about this certificate

name: customer
description: The customer as a BPNL reference.

name: customerPartId
description: Part ID as assigned by the customer.

name: dataType
description: The data type of the properties value and limits. The data type should specify how the string value should be type casted or interpreted.

name: description
description: This field should be used to describe the property.

name: expiryDate
description: The expiry date of the material.

name: isConformWithSpecification
description: In the case that any of the properties that are part of the Certificate of Analysis violates the defined upper or lower limit this property should be set to false.

name: issueDate
description: the date and timestamp of issuing this certificate

name: lowerLimit
description: The lower limit of the specification with a boundary condition of "At least". Values below that limit are considered out of specification. Values exactly at the limit are considered in specification.

name: materialProperties
description: A set of material properties containing the specification and the actual material analysis measurement results. The properties may vary based on the material type as well as the agreed specification of the material and the analysis between…

name: method
description: A set of methods that describe how the part was tested

name: methodDescription
description: This field should be used to describe the method or provide additional information to the referenced norm.

name: methodStandard
description: Reference to the standard that described the method.

name: name
description: The name of the property

name: productInstanceInformation
description: Product instance related information, in the case of Certificate of Analysis a product instance refers to a batch.

name: productTypeInformation
description: Product type related information

name: supplier
description: The supplier (manufacturer) as a BPNL reference.

name: unit
description: The unit of measure used for the property value and specification limits. This can be omitted for non-numerical properties, e.g. Boolean.

name: upperLimit
description: The upper limit of the specification with a boundary condition of "At most". Values above that limit are considered out of specification. Values exactly at the limit are considered in specification.

name: value
description: The result of the analysis for this specific property.

name: CertificateSigningRequests
description: The certificate signing requests model contains the essential information needed to request specific certificates for a unique ECU component via a Certificate Signing Request (CSR) and to validate and certificate the ECU against this data.

name: CertificateSigningRequestsEntity
description: The Entity of a certificate signing requests to additionally structure the set.

name: certificateSigningRequest
description: A CSR (Certificate Signing Request) is a 64-based PEM formatted and encrypted message to request and receive a digital certificate. The CSR validates the information required by a specific certification authority (CA) to issue the associat…

name: certificateSigningRequestList
description: Describes one or more Certificate Singing Requests (CSR). Each set entry contains additional information (e.g. subjectCommonName, subjectLocality, etc.) in readable form, which is otherwise part of the encrypted CSR.

name: subjectCommonName
description: Describes the common name on where the certificate is requested.

name: subjectLocality
description: Provides information about the specific type of the ECU that will be certified. The value for the subjectLocality is always the same for an ECU and its attached CSRs, but is required to additionally validate each individual CSR.

name: subjectSerialNumber
description: The serial number of the assembly part generated by the manufacturer that is used to identify the ECU component in a unique way. The subject serial number is identical to the serial number (partInstanceId) specified in the aspect model Ser…

name: ClassifiedLoadSpectrum
description: load spectrum with classified loads

name: BodySets
description: Body contains the data lists of load channel classes and the corresponding countings.

name: ClassesListEntity
description: Each channel class list are identified by the name and contains the list of classes describing the load.

name: CountsEntity
description: List of counts according to the load channel lists.

name: HeaderEntity
description: Information on the classified load spectrum including kind of classificationen, Classes, Limits

name: LoadChannelEntity
description: Full information on loadchannel including name, unit, limits, classes

name: Metadata
description: All information decribing the source, purpose and application of the load spectrum.

name: ResiduumEntity
description: Rainflow counting is restricted to one channel. Unclosed hystereses are described as list of classes.

name: StatusEntity
description: Status describes the date when this aspect is filled, the according mileage and according operating time.

name: binLimits
description: In case of non- equidistant classes, the limits of the intervalls are given here. Optional, but if given, this list will be used. List must start with lowerLimit and end with upperLimit.

name: body
description: List of load channel classes and corresponding counts

name: channelName
description: identifier of the load channel, needed to combine the loading with the damage calculation

name: channels
description: Full information on loadchannel including name, unit, limits, classes

name: classList
description: The class list contains the classes describing the load. The loading is the combination of all load channel classes, therefore, duplicates are possible.

name: className
description: Channel name extended by "-class". In case of rainflow counting, the extention is from-class and to-class.

name: classes
description: Several load channel classes are sorted in a list. For rainflow counting, a load channel has two channel class lists, from-class and to-class.

name: componentDescription
description: Component or assembly the load spectrum is valid for. A ZF_lrd counted load spectrum belomgs to a gear set while a temperature load spectrum belong to the part where the temperature is measured (gear oil or IGBT).

name: countingMethod
description: Type of classification: rainflow or event counting or load revolution distribution

name: countingUnit
description: depending on counted value: if revolutions are counted, counted unit might be 1/min or 1/s. Required, default is "/", which means no unit.

name: countingValue
description: Optional. By default, the number of for example events or peaks are counted. Value should be given if for example time or revolutions are counted.

name: counts
description: List of counts according to the load channel lists.

name: countsList
description: List of counts according to the load channel lists.

name: countsName
description: Name of the counted value: "Counts" or "Time" or" Revolutions"

name: date
description: date representing the load spectrum

name: header
description: Information on the classified load spectrum including kind of classificationen, Classes, Limits

name: lowerLimit
description: for classification, a range of load values must be set. The limits and the number of bins decribe the classes.

name: metadata
description: all information decribing the source, purpose and application of the load spectrum.

name: mileage
description: Mileage of the vehicle respectively part.

name: numberOfBins
description: for classification, a range of load values must be set. The limits and the number of bins decribe the classes.

name: operatingHours
description: Operating hours covered by the load spectrum.

name: projectDescription
description: Further information on the vehicle /assembly/component.

name: residuum
description: Residuum of load history i case of rainflow counting

name: residuumClassName
description: Name of the load channel extended by -class

name: residuumList
description: List of load-classes not defining a closed hysterese.

name: routeDescription
description: Information on the route which the load spectrum is representing. For example "city munich heavy trailer" or "motorway light trailer agil driver".

name: status
description: Identification of vehicle status

name: targetComponentID
description: CX-ID /AAS-ID des Zwilling

name: unit
description: unit of the corresponding load channel

name: upperLimit
description: for classification, a range of load values must be set. The limits and the number of bins decribe the classes.

name: DeliveryInformation
description: This aspect represents the estimated and actual delivery information of one specific item, which is being shipped from the supplier to the customer.

name: Delivery
description: Quantity, origin and destination, time of departure and arrival, tracking number and incoterms for a certain delivery.

name: Location
description: Location refers to a specific place that can be identified with two parameters - business partner number site (BPNS) and business partner number address (BPNA). Location MUST include BPNS and it MAY include BPNA.

name: OrderPositionReference
description: Encapsulates the references to identify a position within an order.

name: Position
description: The Position can contain one or more deliveries involving one or more supplier's and one or more customer's sites. A position may be anonymous (no orderPositionReference is set) or may reference a position within an order.

name: TransitEvent
description: Entity for specifying the departure or arrival time and date.

name: TransitLocations
description: Transit locations describes the specific location where products undergo the process of being transported from the source or production facility (origin) to the designated endpoint location (destination).

name: customerOrderId
description: This is the order number on the customer side that can be given by e.g., the customer's enterprise resource planning system.

name: customerOrderPositionId
description: This is an identifier for the position of an order defined by the customer. It's not a technical identifier, such as an UUID. This identifier is used within the business context when talking about the position.

name: dateTimeOfEvent
description: Time of Event signifies the time and date when the products leave (or will leave) the origin location of a delivery (i.e. supplier's production site) or when the products arrive (or will arrive) at the destination location of the delivery…

name: deliveries
preferredName: Estimated or actual delivery from supplier to a customer
description: Deliveries are referred to the deliveries of an order position. One order position can be split into multiple deliveries. One delivery can have a different origin and destination than another delivery.

name: deliveryQuantity
description: Amount of items of a delivery between a supplier and a customer.

name: destination
description: Destination refers to the final endpoint or intended location where the items are meant to arrive (i.e. customer factory).

name: eventType
description: Event type describes wether the mentioned timeOfEvent refers to a departure or arrival and provides the status of the delivery (estimated or actual).

name: incoterm
description: Incoterm which is assigned to a delivery.

name: lastUpdatedOnDateTime
description: Date and time at which the position has been updated by the data provider. Date and time are set according to the timezone.

name: materialGlobalAssetId
preferredName: Material Number UUID of the Customer's Twin
description: Material identifier used uniquely to identify the Material (e.g. PartAsestimated).

name: materialNumberSupplier
description: Material identifier as assigned by the supplier. This material number identifies the material (as estimated) in the supplier's database.

name: orderPositionReference
description: The order position reference contains information to identify a position within an order.

name: origin
description: Origin refers to the starting point or the location from which the items are being shipped to the customer.

name: positions
description: The positions refer to positions within an order of the given item (see material number supplier, material number customer and material global asset ID) for which the delivery information is exchanged. The positions can be differentiated b…

name: supplierOrderId
description: This is the order number on the supplier side that is given by e.g., the supplier's enterprise resource planning system.

name: trackingNumber
description: Is a unique alphanumeric code assigned to a shipment by a logistics service provider, allowing it to be monitored and traced throughout its journey between origin and destination.

name: transitEvents
description: Transit dates provide date and time of departure and date and time of arrival for a specific delivery. Date and time are set according to the timezone.

name: transitLocations
description: Physical locations of the origin and destination.

name: DemandAndCapacityNotification
description: This aspect model defines the standard for demand and capacity notification exchange between business partners. Demand and Capacity Notifications refer to specific events within the supply chain which affect production or demand.

name: affectedSitesRecipient
description: The affected Business Partner Site Numbers of the recipient of the notification. It is RECOMMENDED to set this property. It MUST NOT contain any BPNS that doesn't belong to the receiver.

name: affectedSitesSender
description: The affected Business Partner Site Numbers of the sender of the notification. It is RECOMMENDED to set this property.

name: contentChangedAt
description: The timestamp of the latest change of this notification. Date and time are set according to a timezone.

name: effect
description: Effect or impact on the supply of goods as a consequence mentioned in the leadingRootCause. From business perspective demand/capacity reduction are most relevant values in connection with mentioned root causes. For technical completeness d…

name: expectedEndDateOfEffect
description: Expected end date of the impact MAY be defined by the sender of the notification.

name: leadingRootCause
description: The main cause that has or may have an impact on the supply of goods.

name: materialGlobalAssetId
preferredName: UUID of the Part Type Twin
description: Identifier used uniquely to identify part type twin.

name: materialNumberCustomer
description: Material identifier as assigned by the customer. This property identifies the material in the customer's database. For standard materials (e.g. screws) for which a customer does not have an own ID, the manufacturer material ID should be se…

name: materialNumberSupplier
description: Material identifiers as assigned by the supplier or manufacturer. This property identifies the material in the supplier's database. If the supplier is the data provider, sending this property is RECOMMENDED.

name: relatedSourceMessageId
description: Unique ID identifying the source message that started the notification thread.

name: startDateOfEffect
description: This property defines the start date and time of the effect regardless of the time the notification was sent.

name: status
description: Status "open" should be used in the context of an effect which remains active. Status "resolved" should be used to inform the partner that the effect of the initial notification stopped or has been resolved.

name: text
description: Free text description for notification (max. 4000 characters).

name: DigitalProductPassport
description: The Digital Product Passport (DPP) allows to share process and product-related information amongst supply chain businesses, authorities and consumers. The DPP allows for efficient information flows following best practices; and the possibi…

name: AdditionalDataEntity
description: Entity with additional data. Properties are label, description, type, data and children. Either the fields data or children filled. Children constructs a hierarchy with the same attributes. Data is filled as the end of an path/leaf.

name: CapacityEntity
description: Entity for capacity measurements of an item with an unit and value.

name: CharacteristicsEntity
description: Entity which defines specific characteristics of a product such as different life spans and physical dimensions.

name: ClassEntity
description: Entity to describe the associated product category according to ECLASS. ECLASS is a monohierachical classification system where each class has a preferred name and a coded name that represents the classification structure.

name: CodeEntity
description: Code entity with code key and value.

name: CommercialEntity
description: Commercial information such as placed on market and the warranty.

name: DataCarrierEntity
description: Data Carrier Entity with type and layout of the data carrier.

name: DocumentEntity
description: Document entity with header, content, category and type.

name: EconomicOperatorEntity
description: Economic operator entity with identification.

name: FootprintEntity
description: Footprint Entity for the carbon and environmental footprint with the total value, unit, impact category type, lifecycle and rulebook.

name: HandlingEntity
description: Entity to describe different aspects in relation with the handling of the product. Properties are the maintenance history spare parts, substances of concern and reusable packaging.

name: IdEntity
description: Id Entity with identifier and list type.

name: IdentificationEntity
description: Entity with identification information of the product with local identifiers, other codes and the data carrier.

name: IdentifierEntity
description: Identifier Entity with the attributes key and value.

name: ImporterEntity
description: Entity with information regarding the importer such as the identification and the EORI.

name: LifespanEntity
description: Entity for the lifespan of a product with type, unit and value.

name: LinearEntity
description: Entity for linear measurements of an item with an unit and value.

name: ManufacturerEntity
description: Manufacturing Entity with the identification of the main manufacturer and the facility location as well as the manufacturing date.

name: MassEntity
description: Entity for mass measurements of an item with an unit and value.

name: MaterialEntity
description: Information regarding recycled and/or renewable materials in the product. Attributes are among others material names, ids and percentage. These attributes are mentioned in the ESPR proposal from March 30th, 2022 Article 1: (1) (f) recycled…

name: MetadataEntity
description: Passport Entity to describe version, status, end and issue date.

name: NameEntity
description: Entity with the name and used list type.

name: OperationEntity
description: Operational information of the product such as the owner, manufacturer and importer.

name: PartEntity
description: Information regarding possible spare parts. This is mentioned in the ESPR proposal from March 30th, 2022 Annex I: (b) ease of repair and maintenance as expressed through: characteristics, availability and delivery time of spare parts, modu…

name: PhysicalDimensionEntity
description: Entity for physical dimensions with linear, mass and capacity attributes.

name: ProducerEntity
description: Entity for a possible spare part producer.

name: ProductEnvironmentalFootprintEntity
description: The Product Environmental Footprint Entity with sustainability information such as the different environmental footprint types, the carbon footprint explicitly, applicable rules and lifecycle stages.

name: RangeEntity
description: Entity for the concentration range with two values, the highest and the lowest of the concentration range.

name: SingleEntity
description: Entity for a single concentration for the maximum or actual concentration.

name: SparePartEntity
description: Entity with the attributes producerId, partName and gtin to describe two separate lists of spare parts and possible suppliers.

name: SubstanceEntity
description: Information regarding substances of concern in the product. Attributes are among others substance names, ids, concentration, location. This is mentioned in the ESPR proposal from March 30th, 2022 and changed by the amendments of the Europe…

name: SustainabilityEntity
description: Entity with the properties state, al list of different materials, a list of critical materials and the product carbon footprint.

name: TypeEntity
description: Entity for type with unit and data type.

name: TypologyEntity
description: Entity describing attributes such class and different names of the product.

name: additionalCode
description: Codes for identification can be for example commodity codes. In Europe, two commonly used codes for goods classification are the Harmonized System (HS) code and the Combined Nomenclature (CN). Other codes can also be given.

name: additionalData
description: Data in form of open fields which need to be transferred in addition. The regulation is still under development and may change in the future. To accommodate this, additional data allows the option to include additional data required by fut…

name: capacityUnit
description: The unit of a physical dimensions attribute. For capacity attributes the units are cubic metre, cubic centimetre, millilitre and litre.

name: carbonFootprint
description: The carbon footprint of the product. This attribute is mentioned in the ESPR proposal from March 30th, 2022 Annex I: (m) the carbon footprint of the product.

name: carrierLayout
description: The positioning of data carrier on the product. This attribute is mentioned in the ESPR proposal from March 30th, 2022 Article 8: (2) (c) the layout in which the data carrier shall be presented and its positioning.

name: carrierType
description: The type of data carrier such as a QR code on the product. This attribute is mentioned in the ESPR proposal from March 30th, 2022 Article 8: (2) (b) the types of data carrier to be used.

description: The key hints to the type (identifier of a specific origin, pseudonym of a given domain).

name: sourceDomain
description: The Source Domain of a Reidentification is an input parameter which qualifies the desired target identifiers. In cases where the Reidentification has only a single source domain and this is crystal-clear from the context, it may be ommited.

name: targetDomain
description: The Target Domain of a Conversion is an input parameter which qualifies the desired target pseudonyms/identifiers. In cases where the Conversion has only a single target domain and this is crystal-clear from the context, it may be ommited.

name: value
description: The value property is either a local identifier or pseudonym. The format and type of the value depends on the key property.

name: values
description: The Values property hosts a list of (unqualified) identifiers or pseudonyms. The format and type of the value depends on the key property.

name: ItemStock

description: Encapsulates the references to identify a position within an order.

name: allocatedStocks
description: Stocks that have been already allocated to the customer or delivered by a specific supplier. An allocated stock always refers to a stock location.

name: customerOrderId
description: This is the order number on the customer side that can be given by e.g., the customer's enterprise resource planning system.

name: customerOrderPositionId
description: This is an identifier for the position of an order defined by the customer. It's not a technical identifier, such as an UUID. This identifier is used within the business context when talking about the position.

name: direction
description: Direction of the stock from data provider perspective.

name: isBlocked
description: A set of finished items that are located on the blocked stock area, quarantine area, etc. waiting to be released. Example: Stock is in review and not released due to customer complaint regarding a recent batch.

name: lastUpdatedOnDateTime
description: Date and time at which the position has been updated by the supplier's systems. Date and time are set according to a timezone.

name: ManufacturedPartsQualityInformation
description: This aspect model is used to exchange manufacturing-oriented information of several parts, e.g. for quality tasks

name: AdditionalInformation
description: One key:value information pair

name: ManufacturedPart
description: Manufacturing information for one part. Important properties are standardized. Besides that there is a key:value list to exchange further non-standardized properties for this part

name: Manufacturing
description: Collection of defined manufacturing-related properties for this part

name: addtionalInformation
description: You can use this key:value list for additional properties that were not defined in this aspect model.

name: batchId
description: Manufacturer-specific batch identifier: In which batch was this part manufactured

name: catenaXId
description: The fully anonymous Catena-X ID of the manufactured part - only available after digital twin registry is fully operational

name: country
description: Country code where the part was manufactured

name: date
description: Date of manufacturing

name: hasBeenReworked
description: Indicator whether this part was reworked during manufacturing

name: key
description: Key identifier for this additional information

name: listOfManufacturedParts
description: A list of manufactured parts and their porperties

name: manufacturerId
description: Identifier assigned by the manufacturer for this specific part. In case of common parts: This identifier is not unique.

name: manufacturerSerialPartNumber
description: Serial part number given by the manufacturer. Not available for common parts.

name: manufacturingInformation
description: Collection of defined manufacturing-related properties for this part

name: nameAtManufacturer
description: Name of the manufactured part as given by the manufacturer.

name: numberOfConductedEOLTests
description: Number how often this part went through the EOL test

name: plantDescription
description: Manufacturer-specific description of the production plant of this part

name: plantId
description: Manufacturer-specific identifier of a the production plant of this part

name: productionLine
description: On which production line was this part produced

name: qualityTaskId
description: A unique quality task identifier where this manufacturing information belongs to. Optional to ensure that also data exchange without having a quality task.

name: value
description: Value for this additional information

description: Part name given from the manufacturer or supplier of this part, component, sub component or raw material. A manufacturer part name is NOT unique: All parts of the same kind share the same part name.

description: Part number given from the manufacturer or supplier of this part, component, sub component or raw material. A manufacturer part number is NOT unique: All parts of the same kind share the same part number.

name: manufacturerSerialNumber
description: Serial number given from the manufacturer or supplier of this part, component, sub component. A manufacturer serial number is unique: With the serial number the produced part can be traced within the manufacturer.

name: metaInformation
description: This meta information is valid for all entries in this data set. The meta information is used to tell the data consumer which selection criteria were applied by the data provider.

name: numberOfConductedEOLTests
description: Number how often this part went through the EOL test

description: Plant id of the final assembly of the vehicle

description: The physical state of the material.

name: primaryMaterial

name: processInformation
description: Single Entity of process information.

name: processLoss
description: Weight of loss within the specific childProcessStep.

name: processType

name: productionDate

name: rangeOfUncertainty
description: Tolerance specification in material composition

name: receiver

name: reutilizationMaterialShare
description: Material share from reutilization of materials such as rework, regrind, or scrap materials generated within the process and capable of being reused within the same process that generated it.

name: sender
description: Sender of the RecyclingBatch.

name: startTimestamp
description: Start of the specific process step.

name: thermalCharacterization
description: Characterisation of Materials Thermal: Information about the material's behaviour under various thermal conditions.

name: transferId
description: Identifier for the transport of compositions / components / materials between two actors.

name: treatmentProcedure
description: Process that is used to handle waste according to the choosen strategy.

name: vehicleCondition
description: Condition of the actual vehicle.

description: Series information of the vehicle model that needs to be processed.

name: vehicleType

name: wasteCode
description: The waste code is used to identify the type of waste on part or material level.

name: weighingSlip

name: MaterialDemand
description: The requirements of a customer towards a specific supplier for a specific material. Each material demand is unique by its Customer, Supplier and Material Number.

name: Demand
description: A single demand for a given point in time according to the demand rate.

name: DemandCategoryType
description: Describes the type of a demand category.

name: DemandRateType
description: Type defining the possible demand rates.

name: DemandSeries
description: Encapsulates the demand series related information.

name: changedAt
description: Point in time when the content (any property according to the data model) of the material demand was changed, at the customer, either by a human user or an automated process.

name: customer
description: The Business Partner Number Legal Entity (BPNL) of the party requesting materials from a supplier.

name: customerLocation
description: The Business Partner Number Site (BPNS) of the site at which the customer needs the specified material for this demand series.

name: demand
description: Quantity of materials required in the specified point in time according specified demand rate. This demand should be as close as possible to demand that is derived from the actual production program.

name: demandCategory
description: Type of demand for this demand series.

name: demandCategoryCode
description: The code identifying a demand category.

name: demandCategoryName
description: The name describing a demand category.

name: demandRate
description: Describes the demand rate or granularity of the demand information. It defines how to interpret the point in time.

name: demandRateCode
description: Code identifying the demand rate.

name: demandRateName
description: The name describing the demand rate.

name: demandSeries
description: The demands for a dedicated material in a given time period of a given demand rate, distinguished by their demand location and demand category.

name: demands
description: A time series with a specified demand rate along a given time period to describe the demand values for this demand series.

name: expectedSupplierLocation
description: The Business Partner Number Site (BPNS) of the site from where the customer expects the supplier to fulfill the demands of the demand series. The value is used for informational purposes only and is therefore not binding for the supplier.

name: materialDemandId
description: The Material Demand ID uniquely identifies the material demand within the business relationship between a customer and its supplier.

name: materialDescriptionCustomer
description: Description of the material.

name: materialGlobalAssetId
preferredName: Material Number UUID of the Customer's Twin
description: Material identifier used uniquely within Catena-X to identify the Material (e.g. PartAsPlanned).

name: materialNumberCustomer
description: Material identifier as assigned by customer. This material number identifies the material (as planned) in customer's database. Must be unique for each Material Demand in the customer-supplier relationship.

name: materialNumberSupplier
description: Material identifier as assigned by supplier. This material number identifies the material (as planned) in supplier's database.

name: pointInTime
description: Defines the start of the demand rate as a point in time. The point in time must be interpreted according to the demand rate.

name: supplier
description: The Business Partner Number Legal Entity (BPNL) of the party providing materials to a customer.

name: unitOfMeasure
description: Unit of measurement for demand quantities.

name: aircraftGhgEmissions
description: Position H: Aviation emissions which have occurred in distribution stages upstream.

name: allocationRecycledCarbon
description: Declare which approach for material recycling has been applied. Possible options: not-applicable/empty, cut-off, cut-off plus, upstream system expansion (USE). Refer to Pages 74-75 of TfS PCF Guideline v3.

name: allocationRulesDescription
description: Describe the allocation rules applied to your foreground data (e.g., physical, economic allocation).

name: allocationWasteIncineration
description: Material recycling and waste treatment with energy recovery are considered separate and not equal. Catena-X follows the Polluter Pays Principle which is equivalent to the reverse cut-off approach.

name: attestationOfConformance
description: Property to collect all attestation of conformance.

name: attestationOfConformanceId
description: e.g. unique number of the certificate or verification statement used for tracking and referencing, use UUID v4 if ID is newly generated.

name: attestationOfConformanceLink
description: A link leading to the declaration of conformance, allowing for a manual option to verify the validity and authenticity of the declaration.

name: attestationStandard
description: e.g. PCF Verification and PCF Program Certification Framework

name: attestationType
description: Attestation type, which defines the type and level of trust conveyed by this attestation of conformance (PCF Program certification; PCF 3rd party verification ; PCF 2nd party verification; PCF 1st party verification; ...)

name: biogenicCO2Uptake
preferredName: GWP biogenic CO2-uptake (biogenic CO2 contained in the product)
description: Position D (negative contribution): Biogenic CO2 uptake. The CO2 which was absorbed from the atmosphere during the growth period of the biomass and of which the C is now bound in the product as biogenic carbon content.

name: biogenicCarbonContent
description: Carbon content defined as biogenic. It can be attributed by means of mass balancing.

name: biogenicNonCO2Emissions
preferredName: GWP biogenic emissions other than CO2
description: Position C: non-CO2 biogenic emissions related to agricultural activities. It encompasses emissions as described in PACT v3.0: CH4 emissions from livestock and manure; CH4 emissions from biomass burning and fires; CH4 emissions from rice p…

name: boundaryProcessesDescription
description: Brief description of the significantly contributing manufacturing steps of the product (including general description of used technologies). This attribute is only included for compatibility reasons with TfS/PACT in the Catena-X data model…

name: carbonContentTotal
description: Total carbon content

name: ccsTechnologicalCO2CaptureIncluded
description: Declare if CCS/BECCS (incl. geological storage) technology has been employed. BECCS stands for bioenergy with carbon capture and storage.

name: comment
description: This text field can be used to provide the recipient of the data with additional information or instructions on the calculation that is not represented by the existing attributes of the data model.

name: companyIds
description: Company identifier according to the sharing scheme you are reporting in. It is mandatory to provide the BPNL (Business Partner Number Legal; corresponding to the company name) according to Catena-X. Each value of this set is supposed to un…

name: companyName
description: State the (legal) name of the company supplying the product and reporting the PCF (data owner). The name under which the company signed up with Catena-X (via Business Partner Management service).

name: completedAt
description: Time stamp for when the attestation of conformity was issued

name: created
description: The time stamp at which the PCF has been declared, independently of when or if it has been shared. This represents the validity period start unless specified separately.

name: crossSectoralStandards
description: Cross-sectoral standards the PCF calculation is based on (multiple entries are possible). Please note: the PCF can be calculated according to another standard than the standards which defines the communication format.

name: declaredUnitAmount
description: The quantity, or amount, of the declared unit is provided as a numerical value. The Product Carbon Footprint (PCF) is based on this declared unit amount, rather than assuming a default value of one unit. For example, a Battery Electric Veh…

name: declaredUnitOfMeasurement
description: The declared unit defines the reference quantity to which the inputs and outputs in a Product Carbon Footprint (PCF) calculation are related, such as kilograms of product, a single piece of a component, or megajoules of electrical energy.…

name: precedingPfIds
description: This is only a technical parameter that ensures comparability with PACT 3.0.0, but is not used in Catena-X. For PCF data exchange via Catena-X, it must therefore be set to the default value "0".

name: primaryDataShare
description: Share of primary data in the final PCF. For prospective PCF this shall not be communicated or set "0"

name: productClassifications
description: A list of classification or category identifiers in URN format. Use well known urn's here, or adhere to recommended urn:pact: format. For example UN CPC, CAS Number, CN-Code etc. For communication us URN fromat (e.g. urn:gtin:4712345060507…

name: productDescription
description: A brief description of the product (for example functions and technical parameters) to help identifying the correct product. Product IDs are not always unique accross organizations or at times insufficient to identify the correct product.…

name: productIds
description: A set of several relevant product identifiers can be provided including e.g. manufacturerPartID, customerPartID, GTIN, ISPN-number or any product specific identifier. For prospective PCFs, this may be a preliminary product id.

name: productMassPerDeclaredUnit
preferredName: Product mass [kg] per declared unit amount
description: The mass of the product per declared unit amount in kilogram, (e.g., the declared unit of a circuitboard is one piece; one piece represents 0.123 kg). Product mass excluding packaging.

name: productNameCompany
description: Trade name of the product to make it recognizable by the receiver of the PCF information. For prospective PCFs, this may be a preliminary name.

name: productOrSectorSpecificRules
description: Name the most specific rule (sector specific guidance frameworks, such as product category rules (PCR), are sets of rules how to calculate and document life cycle assessments. They provide product category specific guidance and enhance com…

name: productVerificationShare1stParty
description: First-party Product Verification Share (1PVS) represents the share of the PCF result which is based on verified data from a first party verifier.

name: productVerificationShare2ndParty
description: Second-party Product Verification Share (2PVS) represents the share of the PCF result which is based on verified data from a second party verifier.

name: productVerificationShare3rdParty
description: Third-party Product Verification Share (3PVS) represents the share of the PCF result which is based on verified data from an independent third party verifier.

name: programCertificationShare
description: PCF Program Certification Share (PCS) indicates the share of the PCF result which was calculated by PCF program certified suppliers.

name: providerId
description: A unique identifier for the entity issuing the declaration, such as a Business Partner Number (BPN) or other official registration number, issued by the appointing organization or accreditation institute.

name: providerName
description: Name of the issuing certifier’s or verifier’s legal entity

name: recycledCarbonContent
description: Carbon content defined as recycled. It can be attributed by means of mass balancing: in such a case the mass balancing used must be set to TRUE.

name: referencePeriodEnd
description: End of time period of data collection for primary data sources. For prospective PCFs the reference period end should be one year after reference period start.

name: referencePeriodStart
description: Start of time period of data collection for primary data sources (this does not refer to publication dates of secondary data). For prospective PCFs the reference period should be equal to start of production.

name: retroOrProspectivePcfType
description: Four types of PCFs (see 5.2.1) shall be indicated in the data model: This is to identify if the PCF refers to a product that is already in series (retrospective) or a PCF for a product before SOP (prospective PCF), both based on the rules…

name: secondaryEmissionFactorSources
description: Which secondary data sources and versions have been used by you or by suppliers (e.g. data bases such as ecoinvent)?

name: specVersion
description: Specification of the PCF format/data model (name and version number), which is used. The required data input fields will be tailored accordingly. Multiple entries are possible. The data model and version can be selected independently of th…

name: standardName
preferredName: Conformant with cross-sectoral standards or product or sector rules
description: The specific cross-sectoral standards or product or sector rules (PCRs) on which the attestation of conformance is based

name: status
description: This is another technical parameter that ensures comparability ("deprecated" only used in PACT; and it may also be used in internal systems), but is not used in Catena-X. Therefore it must be set to the default value "active".

name: technologicalDQR
description: The degree to which the data reflects the actual technology(ies) used. Refer to Table 5.14 in chapter 5.2.11.2 of v3.0 of TFS Guideline for the rating (1-5). For prospective PCF this shall not be provided.

name: temporalDQR
description: The degree to which the reference period is for the data set is close to the issue date. Refer to Table 5.16 in chapter 5.2.11.2 of v3.0 of TFS Guideline for the rating (1-5). For prospective PCF this shall not be provided.

name: text
description: Describes a Property which contains plain text. This is intended exclusively for human readable strings, not for identifiers, measurement values, etc.

name: validityPeriodEnd

name: validityPeriodStart
description: The validity period is the interval during which the product (carbon) footprint is declared as valid by the data provider. The "start" and "end" attributes define this interval. For retrospective PCFs the validity period start must be equa…

name: version
description: This is only a technical parameter that ensures comparability with PACT 3.0.0, but is not used in Catena-X. For PCF data exchange via Catena-X, it must therefore be set to the default value 0.

name: ReturnRequest
description: Aspect to indicate if there is a return request for a product.

name: Price
description: price of the returned article

description: Entity encapsulating the min and max value of the range of monetary values.

name: ProductConditionsEntity

name: TimePeriodEntity
description: Entity defining a range of dates to define a time period.

name: corroded
description: Information on whether the product has corrosion.

name: currency

name: discolored

name: dismantled
description: Information on whether the product has been dismantled.

name: endDate
description: The last day of the period.

description: Describes until when the return request is valid in GMT timezone.

name: maxPrice
description: The maximum price until which a demand request is relevant.

name: minPrice

name: missingParts
description: Completeness of the product, e.g. missing parts are not acceptable.

name: quantity

description: Describes WHY a vehicle, assembly or part needs to be returned to the requestor and under which conditions.

name: startDate
description: The first day of the period

name: title
description: The request name to be used by the buyer to navigate through the list of demand requests.

name: unitOfMeasure
description: The unit of measure (related to quantity).

name: validityPeriod
description: Specifies the time period when the need exists

description: MIME-Type, file name and file contents given by the file SubmodelElement

description: The way data is organized, structured, or coded to make it readable or interpretable

name: formatVersion
description: Version of the format with which a file or data structure was created or encoded

name: sbom
description: The software bill of materials for the software module in the specified form

name: spdxData

name: status
description: Current state or situation of an object or a system

name: supplier
description: Name of supplier which provides the customer with a product or a service

name: SealantPass
description: The Sealant Passport represents the needs from manufacturers of chemical substance and mixtures. It describes data required by the safety data sheet (SDS) - which is based on the REACH Regulation No 1907/2006 in the format of a DPP.

name: ApplicationEntity
description: Entity encapsulating the substance or mixtures application.

name: CarbonFootprintEntity
description: Entity encapsulating the carbon footprint.

name: ChemicalCompositionEntity
description: Entity encapsulating the chemical composition and nature.

name: DocumentEntity
description: Entity encapsulating the details of a attachment for the chemical substances and mixtures of the pass.

name: HazardsIdentificationEntity
description: Entity encapsulating the hazards on a substance or mixture.

name: IngredientsEntity
description: Entity encapsulating the ingredients.

name: LocateEntity
description: Entity encapsulating the details from the documents title and location.

name: OtherInformationEntity
description: Entity encapsulating the required information.

name: PerformanceEntity
description: Entity encapsulating the measures of the performance and durability.

name: ProductCompositionEntity
description: Entity encapsulating the product composition information.

name: ProductDisposalEntity
description: Entity encapsulating the information needed for the product disposal.

name: ProductIdentificationEntity
description: Entity encapsulating the product identification.

name: ProductPropertyEntity
description: Entity encapsulating the product properties.

name: RegulatoryInformationEntity
description: Entity encapsulating the regulatory information.

name: SafetyMeasureEntity
description: Entity encapsulating the safety measures.

name: SpecificsSDSEntity
description: Entity encapsulating the details from the safety data sheet (SDS) documentation.

name: SupplierEntity
description: Entity encapsulating the information from the supplier.

name: TransportInformationEntity
description: Entity encapsulating the transport information data.

name: application
description: Relevant identified uses of the substance or mixture and uses advised against.

name: authorSDS
description: safety data sheet (SDS) author changing the document.

name: carbonFootprint
description: Describes the carbon footprint of the substance or mixture based on the Ecodesign.

name: casNumber
description: A CAS registry number is a unique identification number assigned by the Chemical Abstracts Service (CAS).

name: chemicalName
description: Name of the chemical.

name: chemicalNature
description: Chemical nature of the mixture or substance.

name: chemicalPercentage
description: Describes chemical distribution in percentage. It can include a percentage range. Either 10% or 5,5%-6% . Allowed are decimal values with a "," separator. Mandatory are no spaces between the values and the percentage character.

name: classificationGHS
description: The classification of the substance or the mixture which results from the application of the classification criteria in Regulation (EC) No 1272/2008 shall be given.

name: co2FootprintTotal
description: The total carbon footprint, calculated as kg of carbon dioxide equivalent.

name: colour
description: The colour of the substance or mixture as supplied is indicated.

name: composition
description: Describes the chemical identity of the ingredient(s) of the substance or mixture.

name: crossSectoralStandardsUsed
description: Discloses the cross-sectoral standards applied for calculating or allocating GHG (Greenhouse Gas) emissions as specified by the WBCSD (World Business Council for Sustainable Development) Pathfinder initiative.

name: curingTime
description: Cure time is the time that determines how long it will take for the material to fully cure. A number of chemical reactions occur during this time, for the material to harden. It can take a long time for a material to fully cure.

name: declarationOfConformity
description: Declaration of conformity (CE) is describing a regulatory requirement from the EU.

name: density
description: Density and relative density shall generally be indicated at standard conditions of temperature and pressure.

name: dgClass
description: The transport hazard class (and subsidiary risks) assigned to the substances or mixtures on the basis of the predominant hazard that they present according to the UN Model Regulations shall be provided.

name: dgPack
description: The packing group number from the UN Model Regulations shall be provided, if applicable, as required by the UN Model Regulations, ADR, RID and ADN.

name: documentLanguage
description: Language of the safety data sheet (SDS) document.

name: documentLocation
description: Location or link of and to the document.

name: documentTitle
description: The header or title of the document.

name: documentVersion
description: Version of the document.

name: documents
description: Set of documents containing the description of components.

name: dueDiligence
description: Report on supply chain due diligence policies. Link to document or website on its supply chain due diligence policies.

name: ecNumber
description: The European Commission number (EC number), is the code assigned to chemical substances that are commercially available within the European Union.

name: emergencyNumber
description: Suppliers emergency telephone number for information services.

name: exposureLimit
description: Information about the applicable exposure limits of the substances and mixtures (SDS Section 8.1).

name: fireExtinguisher
description: Suitable extinguishing media, for fighting a fire caused by the substance or mixture, or arising in its vicinity (SDS Section 5.1).

name: firstAid
description: First aid instructions are provided by relevant routes of exposure (SDS Section 4.1).

name: flashPoint
description: For mixtures, a value for the mixture shall be indicated, if available. Otherwise, the flash point of the substance with the lowest flash point shall be indicated.

name: hazardousIngredients
description: Ingredients classified as hazardous (SDS Section 12.1).

name: hazardsIdentification
description: Describes the hazards of the substance or mixture and the appropriate warning information associated with those hazards.

name: indexNumber
description: The index number is used as an identifier.

name: indicationChanges
description: in the case of a revised safety data sheet (SDS), a clear indication of where changes have been made to the previous version of the safety data sheet (SDS).

name: limitations
description: Information shall be provided regarding relevant Union safety, health and environmental provisions including the prohibitions and restrictions.

name: localIdentifiers
description: A local identifier enables identification of a part in a specific data space, but is not unique in Catena-X data space. Multiple local identifiers may exist.

name: manufactureId
description: Unique BPN number.

name: mixture
description: Property to describes the mixture.

name: odour
description: A qualitative description of the odour is shown if it is well-known or described in the literature.

name: otherInformation
description: Additional information relevant to the safety data sheet (SDS) document.

name: pH
description: The pH of the substance or mixture as supplied, or where the product is a solid, the pH of an aqueous liquid or solution at a given concentration, shall be indicated.

name: performanceProperties
description: Describes the performance and durability of a substance or mixture.

name: personalPrecaution
description: Information about the appropriate response to spills, leaks, or releases, to prevent or minimize the adverse effects on persons, property and the environment (SDS Section 6.1).

name: phaseTransition
description: Phase Transition temperature from liquid to gas.

name: physicalState
description: Describes the physical state (gas, liquid or solid) at standard conditions of temperature and pressure.

name: possibleHazards
description: A description of the various toxicological (health) effects and the available data used to identify those effects (SDS Section 11.1).

name: productCode
description: Product Code given to the Substance/mixture as part of the product identification.

name: productComposition
description: Information on the ingredients.

name: productDisposal
description: Describes the proper disposal of the product.

name: productIdentification
description: Identification of the substance/mixture and of the company/undertaking.

name: productOrSectorSpecificRules
description: Product or sector specific rules applied for calculating or allocating GHG (Greenhouse Gas) emissions, e.g. PCRs (Product Category Rules), including operators or pubishers and according rule names. Specified by the WBCSD (World Business Co…

name: productProperties
description: Describes the physical and chemical properties of the substance or mixture.

name: provisioningCountry
description: The country from where the documentation is issued from.

name: reachRegistration
description: A REACH registration number is an 18-digit number assigned by the European Chemicals Agency (ECHA).

name: reactivity
description: Reactivity hazards of the substance or mixtures.

name: recommendedUse
description: Recommended restrictions on use

name: regulatoryInformation
description: Describes the regulatory data points.

name: removalProcedure
description: The documents explain the removal and possible recycling options of the product.

name: safetyDataSheet
description: A link to the full seafty data sheet of the material. A link to a SDS might be provided for several countries and possibly multiple languages for each country. The table includes: version, country name, language of the document and the lin…

name: safetyMeasure
description: Describes measures related to the safe handling of the mixtures and substances.

name: shippingName
description: A proper shipping name.

name: substance
description: Property to describes a substance.

name: substanceName
description: Name given to the substance.

name: supplier
description: Supplier of the mixture or substance.

name: supplierId
description: BPNL of the supplier.

name: sustainabilityReport
description: Link to public website or document. Reporting in accordance with the new European Sustainability Reporting Standards (ESRS) including the new ESG reporting standards.

name: technicalDocumentation
description: Technical documentation refers to documents that explain the use, functionality, creation, or architecture of the product.

name: technicalMeasures
description: Information is provided concerning protective measures for safe handling and recommended technical measures (SDS Section 7.1).

name: tradeName
description: Trade name given to the chemical substance or mixture as part of the product identification.

name: transportInformation
description: Describes transport relevant information.

name: unNumber
description: The UN number or the ID number (i.e. the four-figure identification number of the substance, mixture or article preceded by the letters ‘UN’ or ‘ID’) from the UN Model Regulations, IMDG, ADR, RID, ADN or ICAO TI shall be provided.

name: usage
description: Brief description of the identified uses of the substance or mixture relevant for the recipient(s).

name: wasteInformation
description: Waste treatment-relevant information.

name: wasteManagement
description: Waste management of the substance or mixture and/or its container to assist in the determination of safe and environmentally preferred waste management options.

name: SecondaryMaterialContent
description: This model refers to a part containing one or more different materials. It references the share on primary and secondary materials and relevant details.

name: BioBasedEntity
description: Bio-based materials are materials of biological origin excluding material embedded in geological formations and/or fossilised.

name: CertificateEntity
description: If available, the name of a certificate verifying the recycling content can be included

name: ChemicalRecyclingEntity
description: Materials that have undergone chemical recycling.

name: InorganicEntity
description: Material based on inorganic matter or fossil fuels.

name: MaterialNameStandardizedEntity
description: Material name according to standard.

name: MechanicalRecyclingEntity
description: Materials that have undergone mechanical recycling.

name: PrimaryBioBasedEntity
description: Primary materials are raw materials that are used for the first time during the planned process.

name: PrimaryInorganicEntity
description: Primary materials are raw materials that are used for the first time during the planned process.

name: SecondaryBioBasedEntity
description: Secondary materials are recycled materials that can be used in manufacturing processes instead of or alongside virgin raw materials.

name: SecondaryInorganicEntity
description: Secondary materials are recycled materials that can be used in manufacturing processes instead of or alongside virgin raw materials

description: List of relevant materials, which are built in this part and details on the share of primary and secondary material.

name: UnitOfMeasureEntity
description: Attribute to define the measure and actual mass of the material.

name: additionalInformation
description: This attribute can be used to add additional information on material level. For example could this field contain information about how much material has been reutilised. Reutilization of materials such as rework, regrind, or scrap material…

name: bioBased
description: Bio-based materials are materials of biological origin excluding material embedded in geological formations and/or fossilised.

name: bioBasedClass
description: Information on bio-based material class.

name: certificate
description: If available, the name of a certificate verifying the recycling content can be included.

name: certificateLink
description: The certificate can be referenced for example as a PDF file.

name: certificateName
description: If available, the name of a certificate verifying the recycling content can be included.

name: chemicalRecycling
description: Materials that have undergone chemical recycling.

name: inorganic
description: Material based on inorganic matter or fossil fuels.

name: isPreviousIndustryAutomotive
description: Information if the material was previously used in automotive industry.

name: materialClass
description: Material class according to VDA standard 231-106.

name: materialNameStandardized
description: Material name according to standard.

name: materialNameStandardizedValue
description: Name of the material according to the norming authority and the referenced ID of the norm.

name: mechanicalRecycling
description: Materials that have undergone mechanical recycling.

name: orderNumber
description: Order number as provided by supplier.

name: percentageOfMaterialWeight
description: Share of the full material weight in percentage.

name: referencedStandard

name: secondaryInorganic

name: unitOfMeasureKey
description: Unit of measure in which the mass of the material is measured.

name: unitOfMeasureValue

name: SecondaryMaterialContentCalculated

name: SecondaryMaterialContentVerifiable
description: This model refers to a built part containing one or more different materials. It references the actual share on primary and secondary materials and relevant details.

name: RangeTypeAbstract
description: A range data element is a data element that defines a range with min and max. If the min value is missing, the value is assumed to be negative infinite. If the max value is missing, the value is assumed to be positive infinite.

name: rangeMaxAbstract
description: Maximum value within range.

name: rangeMinAbstract
description: Minimum value within range.

name: TestAspect
description: Test-Aspect.

name: ValueOnlyExampleAspect
description: Beispiel-Aspekt, der Charakteristiken für Submodel-Elemente testet.

name: AasEntityType
description: A predefined submodel element subtype of the Asset Administration Shell used to model entities without additional statements.

name: BasicEventElementEntity
description: A basic event element.

name: BlobWithContentTypeEntity
description: A Blob is a data element representing a file that is contained in the value attribute with its source code. The code syntax is characterized by its content type (MIME type).

name: Marking
preferredName: single marking information. Note: CE marking is declared as mandatory according to the Blue Guide of the EU-Commission

name: RelationshipElementEntity
description: A predefined submodel element subtype of the Asset Administration Shell used to model relationships.

name: ResourceWithContentType
description: A file is a data element that represents an address to a file (a locator). The value is a URI that can represent an absolute or relative path.

name: SpecificAssetId
description: A specific asset ID describes a generic supplementary identifying attribute of the asset. The specific asset ID is not necessarily globally unique.

name: blobValue
description: The data of the BLOB (Binary Large Object).

name: contentType
description: Content type of the content of the file or blob.

name: designationOfCertificateOrApproval
description: Alphanumeric character sequence identifying a certificate or approval.

name: documentIdentifier
description: Alphanumerische Zeichenfolge, die ein Dokument eindeutig identifiziert.

name: expiryDate
description: Datum zu welchem die Kennzeichnung abläuft.

name: externalSubjectId
description: The unique ID of the (external) subject the specific asset ID value belongs to or has meaning to.

name: globalAssetId
description: Globally unique identifier of an asset.

name: issueDate
description: Datum zu welchem die Kennzeichnung ausgestellt wurde.

name: markingAdditionalText
description: Zusätzlicher sprechender Text für die Kennzeichnung.

name: markingFile
description: Conformity symbol of the marking.

name: markingName
description: Common name of the marking.

name: resourceValue
description: Path and name of the file (with file extension). The path can be absolute or relative.

name: specificAssetIdName
description: Name of the asset identifier.

name: specificAssetIdValue
description: The value of the specific asset identifier with the corresponding name.
