name: valueOnly4ExternalReference
description: Reference conformant to AAS.

name: valueOnly4File
description: Digital copy of this document

name: valueOnly4ModelReference
description: Reference conformant to AAS.

name: valueOnly4Range
description: Range conformant to AAS.

name: valueOnly4Reference
description: Reference conformant to AAS.

name: valueOnly4RelationshipElement
description: RelationshipElement conformant to AAS.

name: valueOnly4RelationshipElementWithAnnotations
description: Example RelationshipElement with annotations.

name: AddressAspect
description: Aspect used for the Characteristic :PostalAddress to reference adress data

name: AddressEntity
description: Entity of an address. Model follows specification of BPDM (Business Partner Data Management).

name: CountryEntity
description: Entity definition for a country

name: LocalityEntity
description: Entity for a thoroughfare which consists of a type, value and number.

name: PostCodeEntity
description: Entity for a postcode which consists of a type plus a value

name: PostalDeliveryPointEntity
description: Entity for a postal delivery point which consists of a technical key and a value.

name: PremiseEntity
description: Entity for a premise which consists of a type (technical key) and a value

name: ThoroughfareEntity
description: Entity for a thoroughfare which consists of a type, value and number.

name: address
description: the adress of the data provider

name: country
description: Country of an address

name: locality
description: Locality belonging to an address

name: localityTechnicalKey
description: Technical key of a locality

name: localityValue
description: Value of a locality, e.g. name of a city ("Mannheim").

name: postCodeTechnicalKey
description: The technical key of a post code

name: postCodeValue
description: The value of a post code

name: postalDeliveryPoint
description: Delivery point, e.g. designation of a gate

name: postalDeliveryPointTechnicalKey
description: Technical key of a postal delivery point

name: postalDeliveryPointValue
description: Value of a postal delivery point, e.g. designation of a gate

name: premise
description: Premise of an address, e.g. a specific "BUILDING" but can also be used for naming a particular site

name: premiseTechnicalKey
description: Technical key of a premise

name: premiseValue
description: Value of a premise, e.g. name or designation of a particular site

name: thoroughfare
description: Street or thorough road name

name: thoroughfareNumber
description: Number of a thoroughfare. As used differently in international context, this number can contain both numerical and alphanumerical values

name: thoroughfareTechnicalKey
description: Technical key of a thoroughfare. As specified by BPDM, this can be a "STREET" or a different type.

name: thoroughfareValue
description: Value of a thoroughfare, e.g. name of a street.

name: BillOfProcessSharedAspect
description: Shared aspect for the bill of process data model

name: BillOfProcess
description: Entity to describe processes in an industrial context

name: Parameter
description: Generic entity to characterize parameters. It distinguished four cases: a parameter without a value, a parameter with a value, a parameter with a value range and a parameter with tolerances

name: PrecedenceElement
description: Entity to link the current process step to its successors

name: PrecedenceElements
description: List of process steps that must be executed in parallel

name: ProcessStep
description: Entity to characterize single process steps

name: TolerancesEntity
description: Entity to express the tolerances of a parameter

name: ValueRange
description: Entity for each value range item

name: billOfProcessIdentification
description: Unique identifier for a bill of process that can be used to reference instances of the bill of process

name: billOfProcessModel
description: Property containing the the bill of process model

name: childProcessSteps
description: List of child processes that need to be executed to complete the parent process step. It enables the expression of hierarchies between capabilities, e.g. a transport capability needs to execute at least a pick, a move and a place capability

name: inputParameters
description: Optional list of parameters that are required to execute the corresponding process step

name: lowerLimit
description: The lower direct limit of the tolerance

name: lowerValue
description: Lower border of a value range item

name: name
description: Name of the parameter

name: outputParameters
description: Optional list of parameters that are returned from the process step and can be used as inputParameters for subsequent steps

name: parameterKey
description: Enumeration that is used to distinguish whether the parameter has no value, has a value, has a value range or has a value with tolerances

name: precedenceElements
description: List process steps that must be executed in parallel

name: precedenceRelation
description: List of alternative process steps from which the manufacturer has to select exactly one step to be executed. In case of no alternative process step, the list features only one element. In case of the last element, the property is not used,…

name: process
description: List that contains all manufacturing steps of a product, whereat each manufacturing step refers to exactly one capability. This list contains all process steps that are required to manufacture the product, specified with the bill of process

name: processStepIdentifier
description: Unique identifier for a concrete process step

name: processStepType
description: Distinguishes process steps based on whether there are the first or last process step to be executed, or if they are a subprocess step, which subdivides a higher-level process step into smaller process steps

name: productName
description: Name of the product whose production steps are specified within the bill of process

name: productVersion
description: Version of the product whose manufacturing steps are specified with the bill of process. It can for example specify a concrete variant of a product

name: semanticReference
description: Reference to a semantic namespace in which the type of the parameter is defined

name: successor
description: List of subsequent process step which can be executed in any order

name: tolerances
description: Tolerances for a parameter

name: upperLimit
description: Upper direct limit of the tolerance

name: upperValue
description: Upper border for a value range item

name: value
description: Value of the parameter

name: valueRangeList
description: List with value ranges for a parameter

name: BillOfProcessSharedAspect
description: Shared aspect for the bill of process data model

name: BillOfProcess
description: Entity to describe processes in an industrial context

name: Parameter
description: Generic entity to characterize parameters. It distinguished four cases: a parameter without a value, a parameter with a value, a parameter with a value range and a parameter with tolerances

name: PrecedenceElement
description: Entity to link the current process step to its successors

name: PrecedenceElements
description: List of process steps that must be executed in parallel

name: ProcessStep
description: Entity to characterize single process steps

name: TolerancesEntity
description: Entity to express the tolerances of a parameter

name: ValueRange
description: Entity for each value range item

name: billOfProcessIdentification
description: Unique identifier for a bill of process that can be used to reference instances of the bill of process

name: billOfProcessModel
description: Property containing the the bill of process model

name: childProcessSteps
description: List of child processes that need to be executed to complete the parent process step. It enables the expression of hierarchies between capabilities, e.g. a transport capability needs to execute at least a pick, a move and a place capability

name: inputParameters
description: Optional list of parameters that are required to execute the corresponding process step

name: lowerLimit
description: The lower direct limit of the tolerance

name: lowerValue
description: Lower border of a value range item

name: name
description: Name of the parameter

name: outputParameters
description: Optional list of parameters that are returned from the process step and can be used as inputParameters for subsequent steps

name: parameterKey
description: Enumeration that is used to distinguish whether the parameter has no value, has a value, has a value range or has a value with tolerances

name: precedenceElements
description: List process steps that must be executed in parallel

name: precedenceRelation
description: List of alternative process steps from which the manufacturer has to select exactly one step to be executed. In case of no alternative process step, the list features only one element. In case of the last element, the property is not used,…

name: process
description: List that contains all manufacturing steps of a product, whereat each manufacturing step refers to exactly one capability. This list contains all process steps that are required to manufacture the product, specified with the bill of process

name: processStepIdentifier
description: Unique identifier for a concrete process step

name: processStepType
description: Distinguishes process steps based on whether there are the first or last process step to be executed, or if they are a subprocess step, which subdivides a higher-level process step into smaller process steps

name: productName
description: Name of the product whose production steps are specified within the bill of process

name: productVersion
description: Version of the product whose manufacturing steps are specified with the bill of process. It can for example specify a concrete variant of a product

name: semanticReference
description: Reference to a semantic namespace in which the type of the parameter is defined

name: successor
description: List of subsequent process step which can be executed in any order

name: tolerances
description: Tolerances for a parameter

name: upperLimit
description: Upper direct limit of the tolerance

name: upperValue
description: Upper border for a value range item

name: value
description: Value of the parameter

name: valueRangeList
description: List with value ranges for a parameter

name: BusinessPartnerNumber
preferredName: Shared Aspect for any business partner number
description: This is a shared aspect for BPN with a regex.

name: bpnaProperty
description: Property based on a BPNA.

name: bpnlProperty
preferredName: Business Partner Number Legal Entity Property
description: Property based on a BPNL.

name: bpnsProperty
description: Property based on a BPNS.

name: BusinessPartnerNumber
preferredName: Shared Aspect for any business partner number
description: This is a shared aspect for BPN with a regex.

name: bpnaProperty
description: Property based on a BPNA.

name: bpnlProperty
preferredName: Business Partner Number Legal Entity Property
description: Property based on a BPNL.

name: bpnsProperty
description: Property based on a BPNS.

name: ContactInformation
description: Entity encapsulating the contact details

name: ContactEntity
description: Entity to bundle the properties for the information on how to contact an organization

name: contactProperty
description: Property describing contact information for an organization

name: email
description: An email address

name: faxNumber
description: Fax number with country and area code

name: phoneNumber
description: Phone number with country and area code

name: website
description: Website of the contact.

name: KeyValueList
description: A list of key value pairs for local identifiers, which are composed of a key and a corresponding value.

name: ValidityPeriodEntity
description: If a validity period only has a start that means that the period is valid from the start date without a (yet)defined end date and vice versa.

name: businessPartner
description: The supplier of the given child item.

name: createdOn
description: Timestamp when the relation between the parent part and the child part was created

name: customerPartId
description: Part ID as assigned by the customer of the part. The customer Part ID identifies the part (as designed)in the customer`s dataspace. The Part ID does not reference a specific instance of a part and thus should not be confused with the seria…

name: customers
description: A list of all customers of this item. If the parent items in which this item is assembled into are known, they should be listed as well. For serialized items the list should contain only one customer with one parent item. As different subs…

name: globalAssetId
description: The fully anonymous ID in the dataspace of the part.

name: key
description: The key of a local identifier.

name: lastModifiedOn
description: Timestamp when the assembly or usage relationship between parent part and child part was last modified.

name: localIdentifiers
description: A local identifier enables identification of a part in a specific dataspace, but is not unique in the Catena-X dataspace. Multiple local identifiers may exist.

name: manufacturerPartId
description: Part ID as assigned by the manufacturer of the part. The Part ID identifies the part (as designed) in the manufacturer`s dataspace. The Part ID does not reference a specific instance of a part and thus should not be confused with the seria…

name: nameAtCustomer
description: Name of the part as assigned by the customer

name: nameAtManufacturer
description: Name of the part as assigned by the manufacturer

name: validFrom
description: Start date and time of validity period.

name: validTo
description: End date of validity period.

name: validityPeriod
description: The period of time during which the parent-child relation is valid. This relates to whether a child part can be built into or used in the production of the parent part at a given time. If no validity period is given the relation is conside…

name: value
description: The value of an identifier.

name: ManufacturingEntity
description: Encapsulates the manufacturing relevant attributes

name: manufacturingInformation
description: Information from manufacturing process, such as manufacturing date and manufacturing country

name: productionDate
description: Timestamp of the manufacturing date as the final step in production process (e.g. final quality check, ready-for-shipment event)

name: ClassificationEntity
description: Encapsulates data related to the classification of the part.

name: description
description: Optional property describing the classification standard.

name: id
description: The classification ID of the part type according to the corresponding standard definition mentioned in the key value pair.

name: partClassification
description: Property describing the classification of a part.

name: standard
description: Identified classification standards

name: SitesEntity
description: Describes the ID and function of a site for the associated part in the AsBuilt context(e.g. SerialPart, Batch, jIS).

name: function
description: The function of the site in relation to the part(i.e. the activity within the value chain of the part that is performed at the site)

name: siteId
description: The identifier of the site according to BPDM. The siteId must be a valid BPN. The BPN is a unique, unchangeable identifier for Business Partners / company locations from foundation to closure, regardless of the different business relations…

name: sites
description: A site is a delimited geographical area where a legal entity does business(geographical address with geo coordinates).A site always has a primary physical address. It is possible that further physical addresses are specified for the site.…

name: MaterialClassificationEntity
description: This entity groups material classification properties.

name: classificationStandard
description: Standard according to which the material is classified.

name: materialCategory
description: The highest-level classification that groups materials into broad, fundamental classes based on their overall nature and fundamental properties.

name: materialClassification
description: Classification of the material according to defined standards.

name: materialGroup
description: A more specific subdivision within a Material Category. It organizes materials into technical families that share similar composition, structure, and performance characteristics.

name: materialSubgroup
description: A refined subset of a Material Group that classifies materials according to detailed technical distinctions such as alloying type, polymer family, manufacturing process, or functional properties.

name: MessageHeaderAspect
description: Aspect model describing the shared message header.

name: context
description: Information about the context the message should be considered in. The value MUST consist of two parts: an identifier of the context (e.g. business domain, etc.) followed by a version number. Both the identifier and the version number MUST…

name: expectedResponseBy
description: Time zone aware timestamp holding the date and time by which the sending party expects a certain type of response from the receiving party. The meaning and interpretation of the fields's value are context-bound and MUST therefore be define…

name: header
description: Contains standardized attributes for message processing common across several use cases.

name: messageId
description: Unique ID identifying the message. The purpose of the ID is to uniquely identify a single message, therefore it MUST not be reused.

name: receiverBpn
description: The Business Partner Number of the receiving party. The value MUST be a valid BPN. BPNA and BPNS are not allowed. Applicable constraints are defined in the corresponding standard.

name: relatedMessageId
description: Unique ID identifying a message somehow related to the current one

name: senderBpn
description: The Business Partner Number of the sending party. The value MUST be a valid BPN. BPNA and BPNS are not allowed. Applicable constraints are defined in the corresponding standard

name: sentDateTime
description: Time zone aware timestamp holding the date and the time the message was sent by the sending party. The value MUST be formatted according to the ISO 8601 standard

name: version
description: The unique identifier of the aspect model defining the structure and the semantics of the message's header. The version number should reflect the versioning schema of aspect models in Catena-X.

name: QualityCore
description: This semantic model serves as library for other Catena-X models from Catena-X Quality Management. It ensures that same properties that are used in different models are defined in the same way. Please keep in mind: Due to the nature of a li…

name: AdditionalInformation
description: One key:value information pair

name: General
description: Bundling general properties that do not belong to parts or vehicles.

name: MetaInformation
description: Meta information properties give hints for a Catena-X data consumer to better understand, how this data set was created on the Catena-X data provider side.

name: Part
description: A collection of part/component properties. A Catena-X data provider should provide the properties that are useful for a Catena-X data consumer to clearly identify the part/component. For example, this can be done by using a serial number,…

name: Plant
description: Bundling plant/production properties.

name: Vehicle
description: Bundling vehicle/car properties like anonymizedVIN or mileage counter.

name: WorkshopProperties
description: All properties to clearly identify a workshop.

name: additionalInformationList
description: You can use this key:value list for additional properties that were not defined in this aspect model.

name: anonymizedVIN
description: Vehicle manufacturer-specific anonymized VIN, which is still a unique identifier within this data provider.

name: assemblyPartNumberVersion
description: Often vehicle manufacturer specific: An assembly part number version. Assembly parts are often produced by a supplier that combines his own parts with other parts from other suppliers and ships as one assembly to a vehicle manufacturer.

name: batchNumber
description: A batch number describes all parts that were manufactured in the same run.

name: calibrationInformation
description: Calibration for this ECU. This could be the result of a calibration process.

name: countryCode
description: Country code in ISO 3166-1 alpha-3 codes where this session took place

name: dataMatrixCode
description: String that is encoded in a data matrix code. Data matrix codes or short DMC are labelled/printed on parts. Example: A data matrix code can combine supplier name, part type, manufacturing and many more information. A DMC string is often un…

name: deliveryNote
description: The delivery note of a package. A delivery note is unique within one logistics company.

name: general
description: Bundling general properties that do not belong to parts or vehicles.

name: hexValue
description: Hex values are encoded in 0-9,a-f or A-F to store information.

name: hwVersion
description: The hardware version of this part.

name: key
description: Key identifier for this additional information

name: latitude
description: Latitude property for GPS coordinates.

name: longitude
description: Longitude property for GPS coordinates.

name: metaInformation
description: This meta information is valid for all entries in this data set. The meta information is used to tell the data consumer which selection criteria were applied by the data provider.

name: mileage
description: The mileage counter in the car. Only positive numbers are allowed.

name: mileageUnit
description: Enumeration to define the unit of measure for mileage counter: Either kilometer (SI standard) or miles.

name: orderNumber
description: The order number of this order. This is a unique identifier defined by the supplier of the order. If you combine order number and BPNL of the supplier you get a unique identifier in this data-space.

name: part
description: Bundling part/component properties. A part/component is meant as one piece in a vehicle. The terms part and component are synonymes.

name: partDescription
description: A textual description of the part.

name: partId
description: A unique part identifier in this data-space. Property is optional as of now not all parts have this identifier.

name: partName
description: The name of a part. A part name is not unique - same kinds of parts can have the same part name.

name: partNumber
description: The number of a physical part. A part number is not unique - same kinds of parts can have same part numbers. Part numbers and part description normally relate to each other.

name: partVersion
description: The version of this hardware part.

name: plant
description: Bundling plant/production properties.

name: plantBPNS
description: A unique plant identifier according BPNS definition. This property is optional as of now not all plants have assigned BPNS identifiers.

name: plantCountryCode
description: Country code of the plant, where the vehicle was produced.

name: plantDescription
description: Long name of the production plant.

name: plantIdentifier
description: Identifier of a plant within the company owning the plant. If you combing plant identifier with BPNL of the company owning the plant than you get a unique identifier fo this plant in this data-space.

name: productionDate
description: Production Date of the vehicle in The sold date of the vehicle in ISO8601 local date notation - see java.time.format.ISO_LOCAL_DATE.

name: qualityTaskId
description: A unique quality task identifier within this data-space.

name: recordStatus
description: The record operation enumeration can be used to realize delta update concept. An example using scenario that data delivery runs weekly: Week0: All data is transferred -> all rows have recordStatus=new. Week1: Only the changed data is trans…

name: selectionCriteria
description: Describes the selection criteria a Catena-X data provider has applied to create this data set.

name: selectionEnd
description: Describes the end point for providing records in this data set.

name: selectionStart
description: Describes the starting point for providing records in this data set.

name: serialNumber
description: Serial number of one specific part. A serial number is unique within one company. If you combine serial number with BPNL of that company than you get a unique identifier for this part in this data-space.

name: sessionId
description: A unique identifier for a session. If you combine the session property with BPNL of data provider than you get a unique identifier for this session in this data-space.

name: soldDate
description: The sold date of the vehicle in ISO notation.

name: supplierId
description: A unique identifier for one supplier inside data provider's company. If you combine supplier ID with BPNL of data provider you get a unique identifier for this supplier in this data space. As an alternative you can use BPNL to identify a s…

name: supplierName
description: The name of one supplier company.

name: swPartNumber
description: Software number installed in this electronic control unit.

name: swVersion
description: Software version installed in this electronic control unit.

name: value
description: Value for this additional information

name: variantInfomation
description: An electronic control unit has many parameters that have to be set to work correctly: Examples are target market (which functions need to be activated for the target market) or the equipment of the vehicle (e.g. navigation system is instal…

name: vehicle
description: Bundling vehicle/car properties like anonymizedVIN or mileage counter.

name: vehicleId
description: A unique identifier for this vehicle in data-space. This property is optional as of now not all vehicles have this identifier assigned.

name: workShopId
description: A unique identifier for a workshop. This identifier is unique within data provider's company. If you combine this identifier with BPNL from data provider than you get a unique identifier for this workshop in this data space.

name: workshop
description: Groups workshop-related properties

name: Quantity
description: The aspect may be reused whenever any kind of Quantity and / or unit of measure is used. One can use all defined units via the item unit or differentiate via mass, miscellaneous, countable, linear, area and volume units.

name: AreaEntity
description: Entity for area measurements of an item with an unit and value.

name: CountQuantityEntity
description: Entity for countable measurements of an item with an unit and a value.

name: ItemQuantityEntity
description: Entity for common measurements of an item (mass, count, linear, area, volume, misc) with an unit and a value.

name: LinearEntity
description: Entity for linear measurements of an item with an unit and value.

name: MassEntity
description: Entity for mass measurements of an item with an unit and value.

name: MiscQuantityEntity
description: Entity for miscellaneous measurements of an item with an unit and a value.

description: Entity for time measurements of an item with an unit and a value.

name: VolumeEntity
description: Entity for volume measurements of an item with an unit and value.

name: itemQuantityProperty

name: itemUnit

name: warrantyPeriod
description: Commercial warranty period of the transmission (coupled to the Vehicle) in months.

name: TransmissionPass
description: The transmission passport corresponds to the digital product passport information required by the proposed Ecodesign Regulation (ESPR-2022) and describes the data that is collected and available during the lifespan of a transmission.

name: CharacteristicsEntity
description: Entity which defines specific characteristics of the transmission such as different life spans and physical dimensions.

name: ElectricalMachineEntity
description: Entity for the electrical machine with power, torque and speed values.

name: GearRatioEntity
description: Entity for the ratio in the respective gear. Includes the gear and the ratio as separate properties.

name: MachinePowerEntity
description: The entity for the electrical machine power.

name: MachineTorqueEntity
description: The entity for the electrical machine torque.

name: OilEntity
description: Entity for the oil capacity and type.

name: PerformanceEntity
description: Entity for the performance.

name: SpecificEntity
description: The entity describing various product specific parameters of the transmission.

name: SpeedResistanceEntity
description: The speed resistance entity. Includes the gear and the speed as separate properties.

name: UnspecificEntity
description: Entity for the product unspecific parameters.

name: applicable
description: If there is a transmission-integrated electrical machine included, select true and state the values in the connected attributes. If there is none, select false and provide dummy data.

name: characteristics
description: Defines specific characteristics of the transmission.

name: driveType
description: A list of the type of transmission drive. For example combustion, full hybrid, mild hybrid, plug-in hybrid or purely electric drive (battery or fuelcell).

name: electricalMachine
description: Attributes connected to the transmission-integrated electrical machine, if applicable. Otherwise dummy data (0 or null) can be provided.

name: electricalPerformance
description: Attributes connected to the transmission-integrated electrical machine, if applicable.

name: gear
description: Respective gear for the measurement.

name: gearRatio
description: The ratio in the respective gear (ratio between transmission input speed and transmission output speed).

name: lifeTime
description: Expected transmission lifespan in kilometres.

name: machinePower
description: The power of the electrical machine.

name: machineSpeed
description: Maximum allowable speed for the electric motor in revolutions per minute.

name: machineTorque
description: The torque of the electrical machine.

name: machineVoltage
description: Nominal voltage of the electric system in volt.

name: oil
description: The oil used for the transmission.

name: oilCapacity
description: The defined oil volume in the transmission in cubic decimeters.

name: oilType
description: The type of the oil for the transmission defined by the manufacturer of the transmission.

name: power
description: The maximum power in kilowatt (the operating characteristics of the transmission).

name: powerContinuous
description: The power that can be delivered without time limit.

name: powerPeak
description: The maximum output power in kilowatts for a specified time period.

name: productSpecificParameters
description: Product specific parameters of the transmission.

name: productUnspecificParameters
description: The product unspecific parameters. These are defined by the Digital Product Passport proposal from the ESPR. The main basis is provided by the document "Proposal for a REGULATION OF THE EUROPEAN PARLIAMENT AND OF THE COUNCIL establishing a…

name: serviceHistory
description: Documentation of the service history of the transmission.

name: speed
description: The permissible maximum input speed in the respective gear (depending on the transmission type) in 1/min.

name: speedResistance
description: The permissible maximum input speed in the respective gear depending on the transmission type.

name: spreading
description: The transmission spreading coefficient. The ratio between the smallest (shortest gear) and the largest (longest gear) ratio.

name: standardGearRatio
description: The ratio in the respective gear (ratio between transmission input speed and transmission output speed). For example 1 : 4.1567; 2 : 3.898; 3 : 2.887; 4 : 2.7783; 5 : 1.811; 6 : 1.6545; 7 : 0.4377; 8 : 0.6121; R : -2.2183.

name: time
description: Specified time period for the peak measurement in seconds.

name: torque
description: The maximum input torque in newton meters (the operating characteristics of the transmission).

name: torqueContinuous
description: The torque that can be delivered without time limit in newton meters.

name: torqueConverter
description: A list of the used transmission damper technology (depending on the transmission type). For example NW 200 TTD and NW 200 ZDW

name: torquePeak
description: The maximum output torque in newton meters for a specified time period.

name: warranty
description: Commercial warranty period of the transmission (coupled to the Vehicle) in months.

description: Material identifier as assigned by supplier. This material number identifies the material (as planned) in supplier's database.

name: supplier
description: The Business Partner Number (BPNL) of the party providing materials to a customer.

name: unitOfMeasure
description: Unit of measurement for demand quantities.

name: WeekBasedMaterialDemand
description: The requirements of a customer towards a specific supplier for a specific material. Each material demand is unique by its Customer, Supplier and Material Number.

name: Demand
description: A single demand for a given calendar week.

name: DemandCategoryType
description: Describes the type of a demand category.

name: DemandSeries
description: Encapsulates the demand series related information.

name: calendarWeek
description: ISO Calendar Week of the given time series entry. Must be given as date of the Monday in the week.

name: changedAt
description: Point in time when the content (any property according to the data model) of the material demand was changed, at the customer, either by a human user or an automated process.

name: customer
description: The Business Partner Number (BPNL) of the party requesting materials from a supplier.

name: customerLocation
description: The BPNS number of the site at which the customer needs the specified material for this demand series.

name: demand
description: Quantity of materials required in the specified calendar week.

name: demandCategory
description: Type of demand for this demand series.

name: demandCategoryCode
description: The code identifying a demand category.

name: demandCategoryName
description: The name describing a demand category.

name: demandSeries
description: The weekly demands for a dedicated material in a given time period, distinguished by their demand location and demand category.

name: demands
description: A time series with week-based granularity along a given time period to describe the demand values for this demand series.

name: expectedSupplierLocation
description: The BPNS number of the site from where the customer expects the supplier to fulfill the demands of the demand series. The value is used for informational purposes only and is therefore not binding for the supplier.

name: materialDemandId
description: The Material Demand ID uniquely identifies the material demand within the business relationship between a customer and its supplier.

name: materialDescriptionCustomer
description: Description of the material.

name: materialNumberCustomer
description: Material identifier as assigned by customer. This material number identifies the material (as planned) in customer's database. Must be unique for each Material Demand in the customer-supplier relationship.

description: Material identifier as assigned by supplier. This material number identifies the material (as planned) in supplier's database.

name: WeekBasedMaterialDemand

name: Demand
description: A single demand for a given point in time according to the demand rate.

name: DemandCategoryType
description: Describes the type of a demand category.

name: DemandSeries
description: Encapsulates the demand series related information.

name: changedAt
description: Point in time when the content (any property according to the data model) of the material demand was changed, at the customer, either by a human user or an automated process.

name: customer
description: The Business Partner Number Legal Entity (BPNL) of the party requesting materials from a supplier.

name: customerLocation
description: The Business Partner Number Site (BPNS) of the site at which the customer needs the specified material for this demand series.

name: demand
description: Quantity of materials required in the specified point in time according specified demand rate. This demand should be as close as possible to demand that is derived from the actual production program.

name: demandCategory
description: Type of demand for this demand series.

name: demandCategoryCode
description: The code identifying a demand category.

name: demandCategoryName
description: The name describing a demand category.

name: demandSeries
description: The demands for a dedicated material in a given time period of a given demand rate, distinguished by their demand location and demand category.

name: demands
description: A time series with a specified demand rate along a given time period to describe the demand values for this demand series.

name: expectedSupplierLocation
description: The Business Partner Number Site (BPNS) of the site from where the customer expects the supplier to fulfill the demands of the demand series. The value is used for informational purposes only and is therefore not binding for the supplier.

name: materialDemandId
description: The Material Demand ID uniquely identifies the material demand within the business relationship between a customer and its supplier.

name: materialDemandIsInactive
description: Indicates that this material demand is currently not in use/maintained by the supplier.

name: materialDescriptionCustomer
description: Description of the material.

name: materialGlobalAssetId
preferredName: UUID of the Part Type Twin
description: Identifier used uniquely to identify part type twin.

name: materialNumberCustomer
description: Material identifier as assigned by customer. This material number identifies the material (as planned) in customer's database. Must be unique for each Material Demand in the customer-supplier relationship.

name: materialNumberSupplier
description: Material identifier as assigned by supplier. This material number identifies the material (as planned) in supplier's database.

name: pointInTime
description: Defines the start of the demand rate as a point in time. The point in time must be interpreted according to the demand rate.

name: supplier
description: The Business Partner Number Legal Entity (BPNL) of the party providing materials to a customer.

name: unitOfMeasure
description: Unit of measurement for demand quantities.

name: unitOfMeasureIsOmitted
description: Explicit indicator of whether the unit of measure is left out of the payload intentionally. If "true" it means the sending application sends demand values without unit of measure intentionally and the unit of measure MUST NOT be contained…
